title: Foundations of Rational Choice and Game Theory
description: A flowchart illustrating how rational decision-making forms the basis for game theory by connecting individual choices to strategic interactions.
relationships: Rational Decision Maker selects from Set of Possible Actions based on Preferences to maximize Payoffs
Strategic Interaction occurs when multiple Rational Decision Makers' choices affect each other's Payoffs
Game Theory analyzes these interactions to predict likely outcomes (Equilibrium)
